sections.projects: SOT Student Grievance Management Programming : Java, Python Web Technologies: HTML, CSS Databases: MySQL (Basic) Machine Learning: Scikit-learn (Basics), Data Preprocessing, Model Evaluation Core Concepts: Object-Oriented Programming,Data Structures (Basic) Tools: Git, VS Code, Jupyter NotebookAuthenticity Analysis of Real and AI-Generated Images Using Deep LearningDeveloped a deep learning system to detect whether images are real or AI-generated using CNN and transfer learning. Trained the model on the CIFAKE dataset and evaluatedperformance using metrics such as accuracy, precision, recall, and confusion matrix. Built aweb interface for real-time image verification, achieving 97.67% classification accuracy. Campus Shuttle Routing & Capacity Scheduling Disease Diagnosis using Machine LearningBuilt a machine learning model using Python and Scikit-learn to predict diabetes using thePIMA Indian Diabetes Dataset. Performed data preprocessing and feature selection andimplemented a Random Forest classifier, achieving ~74% prediction accuracy.Designed an optimized campus transportation routing system using graph-based modelingand the Greedy Nearest Neighbor algorithm. Improved route planning efficiency whileconsidering bus capacity and scheduling constraints.
